current_clause: auto-select prohibited and downstream projection/calendar/rationale have no system-primary-default awaiting execution state
required_patch: Add planAuthority executionState selectionOrigin lineage exact half-day display and rationale binding across the full user projection chain
user_impact: Athlete otherwise sees a chooser or cannot distinguish the selected default from the plan currently allowed to run

current_clause: draft options only; coach final selection required
required_patch: Separate deterministic default selection from youth execution confirmation
user_impact: Coach otherwise must choose among avoidable alternatives

current_clause: template and physio consumers still require coach selection
required_patch: Let eligible inputs constrain or suppress one primary default; preserve REVIEW_REQUIRED as non-auto-selectable without restoring a mandatory chooser
user_impact: A downstream consumer can silently restore outdated coach-only selection authority

current_clause: Earlier records encode no auto-selection two-to-three plan options or coach-only final selection
required_patch: Add SUPERSEDED_PRODUCT_DIRECTION headers while preserving historical runtime-off shadow and safety facts
user_impact: Reader may mistake superseded product direction for the current 9.5 default authority

required_patch: Replace with no active runtime before gates and mark supersession
user_impact: Athlete and coach cannot tell target from current state

required_patch: Remove identity from deferred scope; keep activation gates deferred

current_clause: daily-log and race-note clauses absolutely forbid owner export
required_patch: Apply USER_DIRECTED_FILE_OPERATION with local preview confirmation zero network analytics reward and Formation effects
user_impact: Athlete cannot exercise the approved ownership and full local backup choice

current_clause: Recipient share contract and in-app share capability are absent
latest_owner_baseline: USER_DIRECTED_RECIPIENT_SHARE_ALLOWED_BUT_NOT_IMPLEMENTED; separate from analysis consent and standing access
required_patch: Create recipient identity purpose exact-field preview confirmation and no-standing-access contract; memo inclusion must be off by default and explicit when selected; define expiry revocation download and re-share behavior privacy-safe audit youth handling and deletion propagation; keep sharing unavailable until accepted implementation and privacy evidence exist; transport grants no analysis consent and has no Formation plan safety reward telemetry coach standing-access or other secondary-use effect
user_impact: Athlete cannot yet safely share with coach friend or guardian and must not be told the unavailable function already works

current_clause: named human and assistive-technology acceptance absent; middle-school default and authority teach-back incomplete
required_patch: Bind easy Korean default separate selection-versus-execution questions 400-percent-equivalent reflow long-label keyboard screen-reader contrast and reduced-motion cases then run named athlete coach privacy and AT review
user_impact: Some athletes may not understand who selected the plan whether it runs now or what they can do when blocked

current_clause: section 4 records all four self-check fields as collection and display only without preserving the later analysis direction
required_patch: Mark display-only as the current pilot state; add a separate athlete-own analysis contract for tension condition goal pace and mood with provenance missingness within-athlete interpretation uncertainty user explanation and owner approval; forbid current plan safety reward telemetry coach access and third-party use unless each is separately approved
user_impact: Athletes may think the entries are decorative forever or later find them used for plans safety or other people without a clear purpose and boundary

current_clause: missing taper template race collision or unknown exception ends at NEEDS_COACH_CLARIFICATION without an explicit preserved-plan result
required_patch: Separate clarification reason from outcome; preserve the accepted current coach plan and ordinary journal; emit no alternate frame catch-up debt or newly invented exception plan
user_impact: Athlete may read a blocked automatic candidate as having no plan or may expect a newly improvised replacement

current_clause: one completed COMPETITION record counts once but the record boundary between a calendar meet and each heat semifinal final relay or second event is undefined
required_patch: Owner decides whether one calendar anchor contains N separately completed bout records; if approved the anchor contributes zero and each completed bout contributes at most one with parent child dedupe
user_impact: A multi-round athlete could otherwise have real competition load collapsed into one or the same race counted twice
